decoder_heading: Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers

heading_content_part: Cookies are files with a small amount of data that are commonly used as anonymous unique identifiers. These are sent to your browser from the websites that you visit and are stored on your device's internal memory.

decoder_heading: This Service does not use these “cookies” explicitly

decoder_heading: You have the option to either accept or refuse these cookies

heading_content_part: You have the option to either accept or refuse these cookies and know when a cookie is being sent to your device. If you choose to refuse our cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of this Service.By using this app, you agree to accept Facebook’s and Instagram’s Cookie policy. You agree to accept cookies from Instagram and Facebook. Your browser or device may offer settings that allow you to choose whether browser cookies are set and to delete them. These controls vary by browser, and manufacturers may change both the settings they make available and how they work at any time.
